steps.title: Rename the opening noun
steps.content: The sentence begins with an appositive phrase: recordings of electrical activity in the brain. The noun immediately after the comma must be something that can be renamed by that phrase. Electrograms are such recordings, so they belong directly after the opening phrase.

steps.title: Avoid misplaced modifiers
steps.content: Choice B makes hypothetical match scenario responses the thing being renamed, while Choice C makes the soccer players that thing. Choice D similarly makes responses the noun after the appositive. Those choices misplace the modifier. The subject after the comma must be electrograms. The answer is A.
